channel.title: Gadget Humans — AI Worker Gear & Deals
channel.description: Daily Amazon tech deals and gear recommendations for AI workers, developers, and creators. Save money on the tools you actually need.

item.title: Best USB Microphone for AI Podcast Tools — Blue Yeti X Review
item.description: Looking for the best USB microphone for AI podcast tools? The Blue Yeti X delivers professional audio with Blue VO!CE effects. Perfect for content creators, streamers, and AI voice work. Get it on Amazon →
item.ns1:encoded:
Looking for the best USB microphone for AI podcast tools? The Blue Yeti X delivers professional audio with Blue VO!CE effects. Perfect for content creators, streamers, and AI voice work. Get it on Amazon →

Price: $119.99

Tags: microphone, podcast, AI, audio, streaming, content creator

item.title: Samsung T7 Portable SSD 1TB — Best External Drive for AI Work
item.description: Need fast external storage for AI models and training data? Samsung T7 SSD delivers 1050MB/s read speeds in a pocket-sized package. Perfect for AI developers and content creators.
item.ns1:encoded:
Need fast external storage for AI models and training data? Samsung T7 SSD delivers 1050MB/s read speeds in a pocket-sized package. Perfect for AI developers and content creators.

Price: $84.99

Tags: SSD, external storage, AI, data, backup, portable drive

item.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 USB-C — Best Noise Cancelling Earbuds for Focus
item.description: The ultimate earbuds for deep work and focus. Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, and USB-C charging. Perfect for coding, writing, and AI work.
item.ns1:encoded:
The ultimate earbuds for deep work and focus. Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, and USB-C charging. Perfect for coding, writing, and AI work.

Price: $189.99

Tags: earbuds, noise cancelling, AirPods, focus, productivity, Apple

item.title: Anker 737 Power Bank 24,000mAh — Best Portable Charger for Remote Work
item.description: Never run out of battery while working remotely. This power bank charges a MacBook twice over and fits in your bag. 34% off right now!
item.ns1:encoded:
Never run out of battery while working remotely. This power bank charges a MacBook twice over and fits in your bag. 34% off right now!

Price: $65.99

Tags: power bank, portable charger, battery, travel, MacBook

item.title: Logitech MX Master 3S — Best Ergonomic Mouse for Coding
item.description: The productivity king of mice. Silent clicks, MagSpeed scroll wheel, and 70-day battery life. Perfect for developers, designers, and AI workers who spend all day at their desk.
item.ns1:encoded:
The productivity king of mice. Silent clicks, MagSpeed scroll wheel, and 70-day battery life. Perfect for developers, designers, and AI workers who spend all day at their desk.

Price: $79.99

Tags: mouse, ergonomic, productivity, coding, desk setup, Logitech

item.title: Amazon Echo Dot 5th Gen — Best Smart Speaker Under $30
item.description: The smart home essential at nearly half price. Voice control your lights, music, and automations. Perfect for any smart home setup.
item.ns1:encoded:
The smart home essential at nearly half price. Voice control your lights, music, and automations. Perfect for any smart home setup.

Price: $27.99

Tags: smart speaker, Alexa, smart home, Echo, Amazon

item.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 — Best Noise Cancelling Headphones for Deep Work
item.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation for deep focus. Perfect for open offices, coffee shops, or home work. 30-hour battery life.
item.ns1:encoded:
Industry-leading noise cancellation for deep focus. Perfect for open offices, coffee shops, or home work. 30-hour battery life.

Price: $299.99

Tags: headphones, noise cancelling, Sony, focus, productivity, remote work

item.title: Blue Yeti X — Best USB Microphone Under $120
item.description: Professional USB microphone for content creators, podcasters, and streamers. Blue VO!CE effects and studio-quality sound without the studio price.
item.ns1:encoded:
Professional USB microphone for content creators, podcasters, and streamers. Blue VO!CE effects and studio-quality sound without the studio price.

Price: $119.99

Tags: microphone, podcast, streaming, content creation, USB mic

item.title: Logitech MX Keys S — Best Wireless Keyboard for Mac & Windows
item.description: Perfect keyboard for multi-device workflows. Switch between Mac, Windows, and iPad seamlessly. Backlit keys, perfect stroke feel.
item.ns1:encoded:
Perfect keyboard for multi-device workflows. Switch between Mac, Windows, and iPad seamlessly. Backlit keys, perfect stroke feel.

Price: $84.99

Tags: keyboard, wireless, Logitech, productivity, desk setup, Mac

item.title: Anker 100W USB-C Charger — Charge Everything at Once
item.description: The ultimate travel charger. 100W power charges your MacBook, iPad, and iPhone simultaneously. GaN technology makes it compact.
item.ns1:encoded:
The ultimate travel charger. 100W power charges your MacBook, iPad, and iPhone simultaneously. GaN technology makes it compact.

Price: $39.99

Tags: charger, USB-C, GaN, travel, MacBook, Anker

item.title: Elgato HD60 X — Best Capture Card for Streaming
item.description: 4K60 HDR10 capture with zero-lag passthrough. Perfect for streamers, content creators, and anyone recording gameplay or presentations.
item.ns1:encoded:
4K60 HDR10 capture with zero-lag passthrough. Perfect for streamers, content creators, and anyone recording gameplay or presentations.

Price: $139.99

Tags: capture card, streaming, Elgato, content creator, 4K

item.title: SanDisk 1TB Extreme Portable SSD — Rugged Storage for Creators
item.description: Water-resistant, dust-proof, and drop-proof. 1TB of fast portable storage for photographers, videographers, and AI creators on the go.
item.ns1:encoded:
Water-resistant, dust-proof, and drop-proof. 1TB of fast portable storage for photographers, videographers, and AI creators on the go.

Price: $74.99

Tags: SSD, portable storage, SanDisk, rugged, creator, backup
